content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian intercepted the three-headed demon seed and killed them instantly.

But the appearance of a three-headed demon seed here means that there is already a demon seed nearby, which is not a good thing.

"More attention in the future!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

this day.

Ye Tian went to support an Eternal Realm God Realm again, but when it passed, the other party had already fallen.

Moreover.

Ye Tian also saw an incomparably terrifying demon seed, which was definitely comparable to the existence of the peak of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

【Akatsumi】

Through the exploration of the copying talent, Ye Tian knew the name of the other party.

He felt that this demon seed Chi Xun was definitely the leader of this batch of demon seeds, otherwise it would not be so powerful.

Rumble!!!!

The demon seed Chi Xun instantly appeared beside Ye Tian and grabbed it with one hand.

"Become a demon and spare your life!"

Demon Seed Chi Xun said coldly.

Ye Tian knew very well that it was impossible for him to be demonized, and if this secret was exposed26, he would be in trouble.

Seeing that the other party's strength was too terrifying, just by grabbing it with one hand, he felt that his world was frozen, as if he was about to be grabbed by the other party's hand.

So, he didn't hesitate to blow himself up.

Rumble!!!!

The wave of self-detonation swept around, but under the other party's grasp, the energy contracted without any effect.

"An Eternal Realm Divine Realm beginner powerhouse that condenses two Eternal Realm spirits directly blew himself up?"

The demon seed Chi Xun was shocked, and he didn't even resist it.

The Eternal Realm Divine Realm that blew itself up before was all self-detonated after being caught, and when they were about to be transformed into demon seeds, how could they explode directly before they had fought each other!

However, he didn't pay much attention to it.

It's just a primary-level Eternal Realm God Realm, and if you die, you're dead.

......

"That demon seed at the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, it is estimated that only the God of the Immortal Realm can compete!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The God of the Underworld has condensed six Eternal Realm Spirits, and it is also the peak of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and its strength should be similar to that of this demon seed Chi Xun.

Gradually, another period of time passed.

this day.

A piece of news came that the god of the underworld and the demon seed Chi Xun had fought each other, and the result was a double creation.

Now, the god of the Underworld is staying in the Realm Court branch to heal his injuries, and he should not be able to have real combat power in a short period of time, and he will not participate in the battle.

Chi Xun was hit hard, and Ye Tian was not afraid, and frantically began to look for traces of the demon seeds, and then kill those demon seeds, and often provide support.

It can be said that he alone has killed a lot of demon seeds.

this day.

A notice from the Realm Court arrived, and a large number of Eternal Realm God Realms came from the Realm God Realm to support, including many middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, who directly cleaned up the demon seeds.

In a short period of time, the demon seeds of the Eternal Realm disappeared one after another, some of them fled back to the Demon Seed Abyss, and some of them hid in a place similar to the Abyss of Despair.

"It seems that the Realm God Realm has repelled the demon seeds of the Demon Seed Abyss, so there is extra strength to support the Eternal Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After some time, these Eternal Realm Divine Realms returned to the Realm God Realm, and this time the crisis dissipated, and the Eternal Realm returned to peace, but many Eternal Realm Alliances were destroyed.

It can be said that for a long time, it will be difficult for the eternal realm to recover.

......

Ye Tian came here, took out the demon seed corpse on his body, and gained some battle points.

In addition, his son Ye Xingchen also killed a few demon seeds near the Endless Realm Alliance, so there was no problem in dealing with the Realm Court.

But this time, the Eternal Realm God Realm who didn't do anything would be punished, and don't even think about entering the Realm God Realm in the future.

"The Eternal Realm has unexpectedly fallen more than a thousand Eternal Realm God Realms!"

This is the news that Ye Tian just got, and this amount is already exaggerated.

He even felt that there might be more than that, after all, some Eternal Realm Divine Realms did not necessarily join the Realm Court, and if these Eternal Realm Divine Realms were killed, they would not be counted.

Only the Eternal Realm God Realm that has joined the Realm Court and has fallen is counted among them.

Soon.

The Realm Court announced the top 100 Eternal Realm God Realms this time, and these Eternal Realm Divine Realms can all go to the Realm God Realm, and even one Eternal Realm can be relocated to the Realm God Realm Realm.

Among them, there is Ye Tian.

......

"This is the entry credential of the realm of the Realm God Realm - the Realm Court Order!"

Ye Tian got this Boundary Court Order, as long as he was refined, he could shuttle to the Realm God Kingdom with him, and he would not be stopped by the Realm Court.

If there was no Realm Decree, other Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses would definitely be prevented from forcibly breaking into the Realm God Realm, and they would even be suppressed.

After putting away the Boundary Court Order, Ye Tian was ready to exchange the hundreds of thousands of battle points he had obtained for resources.

This time, he killed too many demon seeds, and gained a total of 710,000 battle points, which is estimated to be the most in addition to the gods of the underworld.

With so many battle points, you can exchange a lot of resources, and if you don't exchange them in time, you can't exchange them.

Ye Tian took out a list, on which were the names of various resource treasures, and he carefully selected.

Those eternal realm spirit inheritances, he didn't need them, so he crossed them out directly and didn't look at them.

"It's a pity that there is no Eternal Pillar, otherwise I can exchange some more Eternal Pillars!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Eternal Demon Pillar is of little help to the Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses of the imperfect level 493 Eternal Dao Species, but it will turn their Eternal Dao Seed into a Demon Seed, who would dare to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar?

Therefore, the Eternal Demon Pillar cannot be considered a treasure at all, so naturally it will not appear in the exchange list.

As a result, Ye Tian exchanged some Eternal Realm Treasures, some resources that helped solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and some resources that helped improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

These resources are also mainly for the preparation of the Terran Eternal Realm God Realm in the future, anyway, if these battle points are not exchanged, they will be wasted.

In this way, Ye Tian exchanged a bunch of treasure resources, which exhausted these battle points.

After a period of time, these resource treasures were sent from the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took these resources back to the Endless Realm Alliance from the Realm Court Branch and placed them in the Terran Treasury of the Endless Realm Alliance.

......

"Do you want to go to the realm of the gods?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this.

Now, he has obtained the Realm Order, which allows him to enter the realm of the Realm of Gods, and he can also relocate an eternal realm to the realm of the realm of the realm.

But there are so many eternal realms in the Endless Realm, and there must be no way to relocate them all to the realm of the Realm God Realm.

Thinking about it, he was going to go to the realm of the gods to understand the situation first, and then decide whether to go or not.
